use_cases: Displaying product images with interactive spotlight reveal effects on hover
Creating engaging gallery or portfolio image showcases with 3D tilt
Building visually interactive landing page hero sections with image effects
Enhancing e-commerce product detail pages with immersive hover experiences
Adding interactive image galleries to creative tool or portfolio applications
ai_summary: An interactive image component featuring a spotlight effect that follows the cursor and reveals the underlying image through a configurable overlay. The component also applies subtle 3D perspective rotation (tilt) based on mouse position, creating an immersive parallax-like depth effect. Configurable spotlight size, overlay opacity, and image orientation make this a versatile media component for galleries, product showcases, and creative portfolios.
